description: B's test utterances (Block B2 step 7). Covering: clean correct, vague hand-wave, confidently wrong, multi-concept ramble, off-topic derail. Used by scripts/cp2-integration.ts for A↔B pairing.

utterances.text: During slow start, the congestion window doubles every round trip time until the sender hits ssthresh or detects packet loss.
It like... speeds up until it doesn't, you know, when things get congested or whatever.
ssthresh is where packets die and the connection closes forever.
Slow start doubles the window, then congestion avoidance adds one MSS per RTT, and AIMD keeps everything fair between flows.
Anyway, did you see the game last night? Totally unrelated but wow.
Three duplicate ACKs trigger fast retransmit before the retransmission timeout fires.
